$schemaNote: Schema keys intentionally unmapped by ai-config-sync. compat scan (upstream-compat.yml) filters ADDED/REMOVED scan against these entries, and surfaces an entry whenever its schema_desc_hash drifts or recheck_after expires — neither is a permanent exclusion.

fieldGuide.reason: One-line why the key is not mapped.
fieldGuide.decided_in: PR or issue reference where the decision was made (e.g. "#5").
fieldGuide.direction: Per-direction action. Values: "drop" (ignore in this sync direction) | "preserve" (keep target's existing value if any, never write) | "bidirectional-equiv:<other_key>" (mark intended future mapping target).
fieldGuide.schema_desc_hash: First 12 hex chars of sha256 over the schema description string. Drift triggers re-review.
fieldGuide.recheck_after: ISO date after which compat scan flags the entry as review-due. Default: Claude +90d, Codex +180d (Claude keys are user-facing toggles with higher impact).

apps_mcp_product_sku.reason: Codex Apps MCP host-only product SKU; no Claude equivalent.

desktop.reason: Opaque desktop runtime object (additionalProperties:true); Codex itself does not track its inner shape.

include_collaboration_mode_instructions.reason: Codex-specific developer block injection toggle (renamed from include_apps_instructions); Claude has no equivalent system-prompt toggle.

model_auto_compact_token_limit_scope.reason: Codex auto-compact internal counting mode; Claude auto-compact has no user-facing scope setting.

orchestrator.reason: Codex-internal orchestrator feature settings; nearest Claude concepts (teammateMode, agent-teams env flags) are UI/experimental toggles with different semantics.

AppsDefaultConfig.default_tools_approval.reason: Codex Apps host-only tool approval default; Claude permission mapping has no Apps scope. Same family as apps_mcp_product_sku.

CodeModeConfigToml.direct_only_tool_name.reason: Codex code-mode tool surface control; Claude has no code-mode concept.

CurrentTimeReminderConfigToml.clock_sour.reason: Codex-internal current-time reminder injection; no Claude equivalent.

CurrentTimeReminderConfigToml.enabled.reason: Codex-internal current-time reminder injection; no Claude equivalent.

CurrentTimeReminderConfigToml.reminder_i.reason: Codex-internal current-time reminder injection; no Claude equivalent.

OrchestratorFeatureToml.enabled.reason: Codex-internal orchestrator feature toggle; see codex_top_level.orchestrator.

RolloutBudgetConfigToml.enabled.reason: Codex rollout weighted-token budget; no Claude equivalent.

RolloutBudgetConfigToml.limit_tokens.reason: Codex rollout weighted-token budget; no Claude equivalent.

RolloutBudgetConfigToml.prefill_token_we.reason: Codex rollout weighted-token budget; no Claude equivalent.

RolloutBudgetConfigToml.reminder_at_rema.reason: Codex rollout weighted-token budget; no Claude equivalent.

RolloutBudgetConfigToml.sampling_token_w.reason: Codex rollout weighted-token budget; no Claude equivalent.

TokenBudgetConfigToml.enabled.reason: Codex pre-auto-compaction reminder; nearest Claude controls are env vars (CLAUDE_AUTOCOMPACT_PCT_OVERRIDE, CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW) which are not sync targets.

TokenBudgetConfigToml.reminder_message_t.reason: Codex pre-auto-compaction reminder; nearest Claude controls are env vars (CLAUDE_AUTOCOMPACT_PCT_OVERRIDE, CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW) which are not sync targets.

TokenBudgetConfigToml.reminder_threshold.reason: Codex pre-auto-compaction reminder; nearest Claude controls are env vars (CLAUDE_AUTOCOMPACT_PCT_OVERRIDE, CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW) which are not sync targets.
